Brand Guidelines

Hawkinson Media visual standards.

This page provides the basic rules for using the Hawkinson Media logo, colors, typography, gradients, and trademarked brand assets. Keep the system simple, consistent, and recognizable.

Logo

The logo is the primary Hawkinson Media brand asset. Use the approved full-color mark whenever possible. Do not recreate, redraw, crop, stretch, or separate the logo elements.

Approved use

Use the logo on clean white or high-contrast backgrounds. Maintain clear space around the mark so the propeller, lens, signal rings, and registered trademark symbol remain readable.

  • Use the original proportions and approved colors.
  • Keep the registered trademark symbol visible when using the full registered mark.
  • Use enough contrast between the logo and background.
  • Use high-resolution source files for print, signage, video, and web placement.

Prohibited use of the logo

The logo loses value when it is treated casually. These examples show what not to do. The rule is simple: do not modify the mark to fit a layout. Change the layout to fit the mark.

Do not rotate the logo

Do not skew or warp the logo

Do not alter the colors

Do not apply filters

No similar background colors

Do not crop or remove the ®

Colors

Our primary color is Hawkinson Blue. It is supported by Hawkinson Grey, White, and Black. Blue should be used for emphasis, links, calls to action, highlights, and brand recognition.

HAWKINSON BLUE#36ADFBRGB 54, 173, 251CMYK 78, 31, 0, 2Contrast 2.46, failPantone 298 C
HAWKINSON GREY#808080RGB 128, 128, 128CMYK 0, 0, 0, 50Contrast 3.95, AA+Pantone 877 C

Gradients

Gradients should be used sparingly as supporting graphic elements. They are useful for cards, subtle backgrounds, dividers, and digital presentation graphics.

</>
#36ADFB#A9DCFD
</>
#808080#C8C8C8

Fonts

Rubik is the primary brand typeface. Use bold weights for headings and regular or medium weights for readable body text. Avoid mixing in unrelated decorative fonts.

Rubik Bold
AaBbCcDdEeFfGgHhIiJjKkLlMmNnOoPpQqRrSsTtUuVvWwXxYyZz

Typographic Scale

The typographic scale is built on the Major Third ratio with a scale factor of 1.250. This creates a clean hierarchy and keeps headings from feeling random or inconsistent.

h1 3.05em / 48.828px
Lorem ipsum
h2 2.44em / 39.063px
Lorem ipsum dolor
h3 1.95em / 31.25px
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet
h4 1.56em / 25px
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing
h5 1.25em / 20px
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing
Body text 1em / 16px
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing
Caption text 0.8em / 12.8px
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing

Trademark and brand protection

The Hawkinson Media name, logo, propeller/camera mark, and registered mark presentation are protected brand assets. These assets should only be used in a way that clearly identifies Hawkinson Media and does not imply unauthorized ownership, sponsorship, endorsement, or partnership.

Trademark use rules

  • Do not remove the ® symbol from the approved registered logo file.
  • Do not use the logo in a way that suggests another company owns or controls the mark.
  • Do not place the mark on products, templates, resale materials, or third-party advertisements without written approval.
  • Do not combine the logo with another name, mark, slogan, or symbol to create a new lockup unless approved by Hawkinson Media.

Preferred attribution

When brand attribution is needed, use: Hawkinson Media®. For longer legal or footer language, use: Copyright © Hawkinson Media, LLC. All rights reserved.

For vendor, sponsor, partner, or media placement, request an approved logo file instead of copying the logo from social media, screenshots, invoices, or web previews.
